text.title: Test as Living Documentation Examples
text.summary: End-to-end worked example illustrating Test as Living Documentation against a realistic input.

example.title: tld-2026-q1 password recovery feature
example.note: 12 ACs in Linear; 12 GWT scenarios in pytest-bdd; docs.faion.net/bdd/ rendered HTML; AC coverage 100%; PM reviewed 2026-04-15 and confirmed wording matches intent. Test failure on 2026-05-02 referenced AC-441 directly; BA understood the failure without dev help.

example.title: Programming-jargon test names
example.note: Test names like `test_login_returns_401_when_wrong_password` instead of `Given an unknown email, When the user submits login, Then they see 'unknown account'`. BA opened the docs and could not map any test to a story. AC drift caught only when prod regression hit.
